title: 12 Days of Top Hits - Day 4 | #shorts
full_text: Mom what are you drinking this it's like a green juice it's like cucumber if you look inside there's like crushed up jalapenos it's like a green juice I'm like pretty sure that's a margarita that's what they call it in America just green juice Mar doesn't have alcohol okay whatever you know everything fine there's a little tequila it's a garnish it's 12:00 in the morning but
